crystalVibes.name: Crystal Vibes
crystalVibes.title: IN THE FLOW OF MOTION & FORM
crystalVibes.description: Momentum captures the energy of movement and the elegance of control — a balance between instinct and intention. It’s a study in presence, attitude, and the quiet confidence that comes from owning every step forward.

intoTheHeat.name: Into the Heat
intoTheHeat.title: FIRE, RHYTHM, DISCIPLINE
intoTheHeat.description: A study in pressure and pace: sharp silhouettes, kinetic typography, and a system built to stay legible even when everything moves fast.

radiant.name: Radiant
radiant.title: LIGHT AS LANGUAGE
radiant.description: A modular identity built around contrast, whitespace, and a visual grammar that feels calm but unmistakably confident.

framework.name: Framework
framework.title: STRUCTURE WITH SOUL
framework.description: A design system that scales without turning sterile: strong typography, strict rules, and little moments of warmth.

balanced.name: Balanced
balanced.title: FORM,FEELING
balanced.description: A brand language that holds tension and softness at once, like a steady breath in a loud room.
